research_question: Does a fixed long-only portfolio of the lowest trailing realized-risk ordinary A shares produce positive net returns with lower risk and better downside efficiency than the benchmark?
null_hypothesis: For each frozen variant and gated historical split, mean monthly net return is not positive after multiplicity control or the strategy fails at least one frozen risk gate.

capital_and_execution.weighting: equal weight across exactly 15 selected names
capital_and_execution.decision: D after the accepted session close and before D+1 open
capital_and_execution.reuse: existing V2 A-share commission, slippage, capacity, board-lot, market, suspension, limit and complete-mark rules without modification

universe.security_type: ordinary common A shares on SSE or SZSE only
universe.decision_status: listed, not delisted, non-ST and non-suspended
universe.liquidity: rolling median amount over the latest 20 accepted sessions is at least CNY 20000000
universe.execution_panel: all selected names require a positive finite CNY D+1 open with SHARES position units; any gap invalidates the decision and no replacement is permitted

variants_in_exact_order.formula: sqrt(252) * sample_standard_deviation_ddof_1 of the prior 60 close-to-close total-return-index returns
sqrt(252) * sample_standard_deviation_ddof_1 of the prior 120 close-to-close total-return-index returns
sqrt(252) * sqrt(mean(min(return, 0)^2)) over the prior 60 close-to-close total-return-index returns
sqrt(252) * sqrt(mean(min(return, 0)^2)) over the prior 120 close-to-close total-return-index returns

historical_test_family.order: variant order 1..4, then validation_2022_2023 followed by retrospective_holdout_2024_2026h1

bootstrap.series: chronologically ordered complete monthly strategy net returns
bootstrap.lower_bound: linear quantile at 0.00625 of bootstrap mean monthly net returns

metric_formulas.annualized_net_return: product(1 + monthly_net_return)^(12 / N) - 1; any return <= -1 fails closed
metric_formulas.max_drawdown: minimum over time of cumulative_wealth / running_peak - 1
metric_formulas.calmar: annualized_net_return / abs(max_drawdown); zero or nonfinite denominator fails closed
metric_formulas.downside_risk_adjusted_return: annualized_net_return / (sqrt(12) * sqrt(mean(min(monthly_net_return, 0)^2))); zero or nonfinite denominator fails closed

gates_per_variant_and_historical_split: complete interval count meets the split minimum
invalid decisions and missing/nonfinite marks equal zero
annualized strategy net return is strictly positive
annualized strategy net volatility is strictly below benchmark volatility
strategy max drawdown is strictly less severe than benchmark max drawdown
strategy Calmar ratio is strictly greater than benchmark Calmar ratio
strategy downside-risk-adjusted return is strictly greater than benchmark
Bonferroni-controlled one-sided bootstrap lower bound for mean monthly net return is strictly above zero

preflight.hard_blocks: benchmark_initial_entry_filled must be true, unexpected_exception_count must be zero, and units must be exact SHARES/CNY
